notes: Core Tetris mechanics work but has significant issues: no hard drop (Up arrow), space bar conflicts between title-screen start and in-game rotate, overlay text is miscentered (centered at x=150 instead of canvas center ~250), no ghost piece, and the grid/UI layout feels cramped with the play field only occupying 300px of the 500px canvas width.
Functional but basic implementation with non-standard controls (Space to rotate, no hard drop) and naive rotation logic that shifts pieces off-center.

Core falling, locking, line clears, scoring, next piece, pause, and game over exist, but controls are awkward/conflicted with SPACE used for both start and rotate, there is no hard drop or wall kick, overlays are poorly centered, and the overall implementation is only moderately playable rather than polished.
